findings.content: Current trial-to-paid conversion is 37%, confirming assumption asm-003 that it is below 40%. The drop-off is concentrated in days 14-21 of the trial period.
findings.source: Pro subscription funnel from internal analytics, last 90 days, UAE segment

artifacts_produced.description: Pro trial-to-paid conversion funnel analysis with segment breakdown

self_review.self_check_notes: Verified conversion rate against two reporting sources. Segment breakdown is clean — no blended metrics.
